# pihole_cname_record (Resource)

Manages a CNAME record in PiHole.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pihole_cname_record" "example" {
  domain = "alias.lan"
  target = "myhost.lan"
  ttl    = 300
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name for the CNAME record.
- `target` (String) The target hostname for the CNAME record.

### Optional

- `ttl` (Number) Time to live in seconds. 0 means use default.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID in the format domain:target.
